title: Tritomanthe media
intro: Tritomanthe media, also known as False Plectranthus, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Lamiaceae. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Tritomanthe media include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Tritomanthe media is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat respiratory and gastrointestinal issues.
